points.text: Novartis entered a ~$1.44B strategic partnership with Orionis to advance molecular glue therapies targeting multiple undruggable proteins.
Novartis — Orionis collaboration — Molecular glue degraders — $1.44B deal to develop novel therapeutics for multiple targets; upfront and milestone payments included.
Novartis — Molecular glue platform expansion — Orionis partnership — $1.44B investment to target multiple disease areas via novel degradation mechanisms.
Orionis — Molecular glue discovery platform — Multiple targets — Secured $1.44B deal with Novartis to advance proprietary degrader programs.

Orionis pipeline — Mechanism: Molecular glue-induced protein degradation — Phase: Preclinical/Discovery — Population: Multiple targets — Status: Advanced via Novartis partnership for broad therapeutic application.
Novartis / Orionis — $1.44B strategic alliance — Molecular glue therapies — Deal includes significant upfront payment and potential milestones to advance multiple target programs.
